# Manage workspaces from the CLI

> Generated from [`walkthroughs/bowrain-workspaces.md`](https://github.com/neokapi/neokapi/blob/main/bowrain/web/docs/walkthroughs/bowrain-workspaces.md). Do not edit by hand — change the prompt and regenerate.

Workspaces are the multi-tenant boundary in Bowrain Server — a workspace holds projects, users, settings, and billing. The CLI exposes a thin wrapper around the REST API for scripting workspace lifecycle.

## Scene 1 — workspaces

  sources={{
